subject: Cloud Computing
title: Azure's 2023 Entra ID Outage
description: A micro-lesson that makes Azure's 2023 Entra ID Outage usable.

hook.text: In July 2023, Azure's identity service failed. Nobody could log in. No login means no access to anything.

buildup.text: Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) handles authentication for Microsoft 365, Teams, and thousands of enterprise apps.

discovery.text: A code change in authentication introduced a bug. It wasn't caught in testing because it only appeared at scale.

twist.text: Companies with no backup identity provider were completely locked out. SSO became a single point of total failure.

climax.text: The outage proved that identity services are the most critical cloud dependency. If auth fails, everything stops.

punchline.text: No login, no work. Identity is the most critical service.

quiz.question: Why was the Azure Entra ID outage so impactful?
options: Identity services control authentication — no login means no access to anything
Azure's data centers were physically damaged
The outage only affected test environments, not production
